description: Style Note Tonga's summer collection features head-turning designs, fashion-forward yet classic, this knitted piece will stay in vogue up to the next season. Tap into summer's aesthetic effortlessly while chanelling the runway's hottest trends. Style this with a tapering pair of denims (we recommend a wedge heel for the spring) for maximum effect.Product Details Off-white knitted top with bluish black print all over, has a V-neck, empire waistline, short sleeves with cut-outs at the shoulder region, tie-ups at the cuffs and a tapering hemMaterial and Care 100% polyesterHand wash coldDo not bleachHang or line drySize and FitSlim fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
